crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions, but if there is no actionable inbox item or assigned task, only run: cortextos bus update-heartbeat "idle". Do not send-message orchestrator for idle/status updates. Message orchestrator only for a dispatch decision, blocker, approval routing, or material completion.

crons.name: project-task-poll
crons.prompt: Check for bus/RGOS tasks assigned to agentops-orch. Claim approved AgentOps work, decompose it into project slices, dispatch codex-3/dev with explicit success criteria, and validate evidence before completion. If no tasks, run only: cortextos bus update-heartbeat "idle". Do not send-message orchestrator unless a dispatch decision, blocker, approval routing, or material completion needs attention.

codex_auto_fallback_note: Enabled 2026-05-22 as part of Codex pivot v2 task #4 48h selective-enable window. Revert: set to false and remove from spawn-codex/computer-use call sites in prompts. Widening to all Codex-runtime agents requires separate orch approval after 48h monitor window.
